# MockREST

> Stateful REST mocking server in Swift for UI-test automation. Ingests an OpenAPI 3.0/3.1
> spec (and/or a Swift result-builder endpoint DSL), seeds state from validated YAML/JSON,
> auto-wires CRUD with filtering/sorting/pagination and real-world status semantics, fills
> unseeded fields with deterministic generated data, and serves JSON on localhost. Includes
> fault injection (failNext), latency, bearer-auth simulation, and CORS.

Swift 6.1+, SPM package with two libraries: `MockREST` (server) and `MockRESTCore` (portable,
NIO-free engine). Test-time tool only. Built on the MockCore platform: register the engine on
a shared `MockHost` next to MockQL and both protocols answer one port with one shared state
store.

## Reference

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlexNachbaur/mockrest-swift/main/README.md): overview, quick start, seeding, installation
- [REST format specification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlexNachbaur/mockrest-swift/main/docs/design/rest-format.md): spec ingestion, state model, seed format, CRUD semantics, settled decisions
- [Platform architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlexNachbaur/mockrest-swift/main/docs/design/architecture.md): the MockCore platform and the MockService seam
- [API documentation](https://swiftpackageindex.com/AlexNachbaur/mockrest-swift/documentation): DocC for both modules

## Related packages

- [MockCore](https://github.com/AlexNachbaur/mockcore-swift): the shared platform foundation
- [MockQL](https://github.com/AlexNachbaur/mockql-swift): the GraphQL sibling extension

## Contributing

- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlexNachbaur/mockrest-swift/main/AGENTS.md): instructions for agents working in this repository
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlexNachbaur/mockrest-swift/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): style rules and PR process
